# Dragon's Dogma

name: Take No Damage From Physical Attacks
mode: once
w32 008BFC44 60000000

name: No Damage From All Attacks And Pawns Are Useless
mode: once
w32 008BFC44 00000000

name: Normal Damage (Disable No Damage Cheats)
mode: once
w32 008BFC44 42C80000

name: AoB Take No Damage From Physical Attacks
mode: once
aob 42C80000000000003E4CCCCD3F8000003F000000F821FE517C0802A6F80101C0DA610148DA810150DAA10158DAC10160DAE10168DB010170DB210178DB410180DB610188DB810190DBA10198 60000000000000003E4CCCCD3F8000003F000000F821FE517C0802A6F80101C0DA610148DA810150DAA10158DAC10160DAE10168DB010170DB210178DB410180DB610188DB810190DBA10198

name: AoB No Damage From All Attacks And Pawns Are Useless
mode: once
aob 42C80000000000003E4CCCCD3F8000003F000000F821FE517C0802A6F80101C0DA610148DA810150DAA10158DAC10160DAE10168DB010170DB210178DB410180DB610188DB810190DBA10198 00000000000000003E4CCCCD3F8000003F000000F821FE517C0802A6F80101C0DA610148DA810150DAA10158DAC10160DAE10168DB010170DB210178DB410180DB610188DB810190DBA10198

name: Damage 0 Player
mode: once
w32 008C1944 60000000

name: Damage Player
mode: once
w32 008C1944 60000000
